utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yes ? Yes ? ! How can I help you ?

utterances.speaker: Guy
utterances.text: Yeah , we were ... we were just looking around .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh ... oh , you are ... you are fellow scholars .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: What exactly were you looking for , hmm ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Perhaps , perhaps Dr . Chester Stock musings on the Smiledon Californicus ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Ah ... Ah ... Get out of here ! Uh , meeting someone ? Or ... or are you just here to brush up on Marion views on evolution ?

utterances.speaker: Woman
utterances.text: Uh , actually I find Marion views far too progressionist .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I find Marion views far too progressionist .

utterances.speaker: Woman
utterances.text: I am sorry , who are you ?

emotion_cause.span: 9_I find Marion views far too progressionist .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I am a professor here uh , Ross ... Geller .

utterances.speaker: Woman
utterances.text: Ross Geller , why do I know that name ? It is uh ... Wait ! Did you write this ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yes ! You are the person who checked out my book ? !

emotion_cause.span: 13_You are the person who checked out my book

utterances.speaker: Woman
utterances.text: You know , you look nothing like I would have thought . You are ... you are so young .

emotion_cause.span: 14_you look nothing like I would have thought . You are ... you are so young .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Well I uh , I skipped forth grade .
